name: google-sheets-api-wordpress
description: It is an plugin of wordpress, for send information to google sheets.

scripts.sync:readme: VERSION=$(npm run -s v) && sed -i "s/^Stable tag:.*/Stable tag: $VERSION/" README.md
scripts.sync:version: npm run sync:package && npm run sync:readme
scripts.push-tag: npm run sync:version && VERSION=$(npm run -s v) && git add . && git commit -m "Release $VERSION" && git tag $VERSION && git push origin master && git push origin $VERSION

author: franciscoblancojn
